# Checklist: Security
<!-- Generated by /speckit.checklist -->
<!-- Branch: main | Date: 2026-04-06 -->

## Authentication & Authorization

| ID | Check | Dimension | FR/US Ref | Status |
|----|-------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| CHK032 | JWT tokens never expire (FR-006) — confirmed intentional (CLR-002). Verify no sensitive operations assume token freshness. | [authentication] | FR-006, CLR-002 | [ ] |
| CHK033 | PUT /user password change — after changing password, are existing JWT tokens still valid? (Yes, since tokens contain user ID not password hash.) Confirm this is acceptable. | [authentication] | CLR-005, FR-006 | [ ] |
| CHK034 | DELETE /group/{id} — only owner can delete. Verify is_owner check cannot be bypassed (e.g., by manipulating group_member table directly). Enforcement must be at service layer. | [authorization] | CLR-004, FR-009 | [ ] |
| CHK035 | PUT /group/{id}/transaction/{txId} — only creditor can edit. Verify this is checked at service layer, not just route layer. | [authorization] | CLR-003, FR-003 | [ ] |
| CHK036 | Transaction update re-validates debtor IDs against group membership — verify a non-member debtor_id in the update request is rejected (T034 covers this). | [authorization] | CLR-003 | [ ] |

## Data Protection

| ID | Check | Dimension | FR/US Ref | Status |
|----|-------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| CHK037 | PUT /user response must NOT include password hash. Verify the password-stripping pattern (User model → Service User) is applied to the update response. | [data-protection] | CLR-005, FR-005 | [ ] |
| CHK038 | Password in PUT /user request — if provided, must be hashed with bcrypt before storage. Never store plaintext. | [data-protection] | CLR-005, FR-005 | [ ] |
| CHK039 | Group deletion cascade — verify deleted data is actually removed from DB, not soft-deleted. No orphan records should remain. | [data-protection] | CLR-004, FR-010 | [ ] |

## Input Handling

| ID | Check | Dimension | FR/US Ref | Status |
|----|-------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| CHK040 | PUT /group/{id}/transaction/{txId}: debtor_ids array — what if empty array sent? Should return 400. What if same debtor_id repeated? Should deduplicate or reject. | [input-sanitization] | CLR-003 | [ ] |
| CHK041 | PUT /user: nickname field — check for XSS if nickname is rendered in HTML without escaping. React auto-escapes JSX, but verify no dangerouslySetInnerHTML usage. | [input-sanitization] | CLR-005 | [ ] |
| CHK042 | PostgreSQL migration script (T026) — ensure script doesn't expose credentials in logs or command history. Use environment variables for DB connection strings. | [data-protection] | CLR-006 | [ ] |
